description: Composition Dusty rose tracks made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, with elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, purple piping below the waistband and embroidered brand name over the left leg Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 40 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Do not dry clean Made of stretchable cotton fabric, these adidas tracks are ideal for all your training needs. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit. The stretchable fabric moves with your body making everything from yoga sessions to gymming, an easy activity. Pair it with Sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 38.5" Height-5.9", Waist-26"
